name: Calzone
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove dough from the machine and roll it into circles about 8 inches in diameter.
2. Spread the filling on one half of the circle, leaving a border around the edges for closing.
3. Fold the unfilled side over the filled side and crimp the edges closed with your fingers or a fork.
4. Place the calzone on a lightly greased baking pan. Let rise for approximately 30 minutes.
5. Brush lightly with olive oil and bake at 500°F (260°C) for 20-30 minutes, or until puffed and golden. (I bake them at 485°F for 15 minutes in my oven.)
6. Add 1 1/2 to 2 tablespoons of ricotta cheese and grated mozzarella cheese to each calzone.
7. For the spinach filling: Sauté thawed spinach in olive oil and garlic powder until all water has evaporated (squeeze out excess liquid first). Mix the cheeses into the spinach. You may substitute frozen chopped broccoli for spinach.
8. Serve with a spaghetti sauce containing sausage, peppers, onions, mushrooms, etc. Enjoy!
